===Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!===
[[File:Elite Four DPA.png|thumb|200px|Aaron in Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!]]
Aaron made a brief appearance in ''[[DPA37|Gathering of the Legendary Pokémon!]]'', where he was watching [[Hareta]] and [[Koya]]'s {{si|Pokémon League}} {{pkmn|battle}} from the audience, along with [[Bertha]] and [[Lucian]].
